name: frontend-fundamentals-reviewer
description: Four-agent frontend quality scoring review based on Toss Frontend Fundamentals.

interface.longDescription: Runs four read-only review agents for readability, predictability, cohesion, and coupling, then synthesizes Toss Frontend Fundamentals scores with evidence and tradeoff guidance.
defaultPrompt: Run the frontend fundamentals reviewer on my local changes.
Score this PR with the Toss Frontend Fundamentals rubric.
